title: DfT equality monitoring 2023 to 2024
body: "Information on the diversity characteristics of staff at the Department for Transport (DfT), including the core ministerial department DfTc and 4 of its executive agencies. The information covers staff in post between 1 April 2023 and 31 March 2024.  The data includes information on job applicants for posts during this time.  The executive agencies reviewed are the:   Driver and Vehicle Licensing Agency (DVLA) Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency (DVSA) Maritime and Coastguard Agency (MCA) Vehicle Certification Agency (VCA)   The data reviews – both individually and combined – staff in post, cessations, recruitment grievance and discipline, sickness absence, performance marking and progression with respect to:   gender race disability pay band age sexual orientation religion and belief working pattern   The analysis should be read with DfT’s diversity and inclusion strategy.  "
